name: Pork Chops and Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. Dredge each pork chop in flour seasoned with salt and pepper.
2. Place the coated pork chops in the crockpot.
3. Add remaining ingredients to the crockpot.
4. Cook on low for 5-6 hours or until the pork chops are tender.
5. Serve over buttered noodles or mashed potatoes.
